channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KIRLPNU] Kirloskar Pneumatic Board Meeting on April 27, 2026
item.description:
Kirloskar Pneumatic Company Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 27, 2026. The meeting agenda includes the consideration and approval of standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the board will consider the recommendation of a final dividend, if any. The company has also confirmed the trading window closure from April 1, 2026, to April 29, 2026, in compliance with insider trading regulations.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 27, 2026.
  • Agenda includes approval of Q4/FY26 financial results.
  • Final dividend recommendation to be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to April 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KIRLOSKAR PNEUMATIC CO.LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INDPRUD] Industrial & Prudential Investment Co. Ltd equity shares admitted to NSE dealings
item.description:
National Stock Exchange of India (NSE) has notified its members that the equity shares of Industrial & Prudential Investment Company Limited (Symbol: INDPRUD) have been admitted to dealings on the Capital Market Segment with effect from April 20, 2026. This follows a circular issued by NSE detailing the admission of various securities to its trading platform, including specific lot sizes and designated security codes. The company's shares will be traded under the 'EQ' series with ISIN INE620D01011.

  • Equity shares of Industrial & Prudential Investment Co. Ltd admitted to NSE Capital Market Segment.
  • Trading effective from April 20, 2026.
  • Company shares traded under 'EQ' series with ISIN INE620D01011.
  • NSE circular details admission of multiple securities.
  • Specific lot sizes and security codes are defined for trading.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDUSTRIAL & PRUDENTIAL INVESTMENTS CO.LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [OBEROIRLTY] Oberoi Realty Q4FY26 Bookings Rise to ₹1,673 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Oberoi Realty reported a significant increase in bookings for Q4FY26, with gross booking value reaching ₹1,673 Crore, a substantial jump from ₹836 Crore in Q3FY26 and ₹853 Crore in Q4FY25. The company also saw a notable rise in units booked to 229 from 130 in the previous quarter. For the full fiscal year FY26, gross booking value stood at ₹5,447 Crore, slightly higher than FY25's ₹5,281 Crore, although the number of units booked decreased year-on-year. These figures are provisional and subject to audit.

  • Q4FY26 gross booking value surged to ₹1,673 Cr.
  • Units booked in Q4FY26 increased to 229 from 130.
  • FY26 gross booking value reached ₹5,447 Cr.
  • Provisional figures indicate a strong operational performance for the quarter.
  • Full-year bookings show a marginal increase compared to the previous fiscal.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OBEROI REALTY LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [KIRLPNU] Kirloskar Pneumatic Board Meeting on April 27 for FY26 Results, Dividend
item.description:
Kirloskar Pneumatic Company Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for April 27, 2026. The primary agenda is to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and full fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the board will discuss the recommendation of a final dividend, if any, for the equity shareholders. The company has also confirmed the closure of its trading window from April 1, 2026, to April 29, 2026, in compliance with insider trading regulations.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 27, 2026.
  • To approve audited financial results for FY26.
  • Final dividend recommendation to be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to April 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KIRLOSKAR PNEUMATIC CO.LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PDSL] PDS Ltd Subsidiary Faces Misconduct Allegations; ₹20.15 Cr Involved
item.description:
🔥 Trending

PDS Ltd has disclosed an incident of professional misconduct involving a former employee of its Hong Kong-based step-down subsidiary, Poeticgem International Limited. Legal actions have been initiated in Bangladesh, and PDS Ltd filed a complaint with the Economic Offences Wing (EOW), Mumbai, on January 10, 2026, leading to an FIR registered on April 18, 2026. Preliminary reviews suggest potential irregularities related to historical transactions over four years, starting August 2021, with an estimated value of approximately ₹20.15 Cr. The company states this is a preliminary estimate and does not represent a confirmed accounting loss or an incremental financial exposure at this stage. The investigation is ongoing.

  • Former employee misconduct at subsidiary Poeticgem identified.
  • Legal actions initiated in Bangladesh and FIR filed with EOW, Mumbai.
  • Estimated ₹20.15 Cr involved in historical transactions.
  • No identified incremental financial exposure at this stage.
  • Matter under investigation by competent authorities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PDS Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [VMM] Vishal Mega Mart Subsidiary Penalized ₹4 Lakhs by Food Safety Authority
item.description:
Airplaza Retail Holdings Private Limited, a subsidiary of Vishal Mega Mart Ltd, has been penalized ₹4,00,000 by the Court of Adjudicating Officer, Food Safety-cum-Additional District Magistrate (Revenue), Rayagada. The penalty was imposed following an inspection by the Food Safety Officer on May 19, 2025, which alleged violations of the Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006. The company stated that the financial impact is limited to the penalty amount and there is no material impact on its operations. The subsidiary is reviewing the order and evaluating next steps.

  • Subsidiary Airplaza Retail Holdings penalized ₹4 Lakhs.
  • Penalty imposed by Food Safety Authority in Rayagada.
  • Alleged violation of Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006.
  • No material impact on company operations reported.
  • Subsidiary is reviewing the order and next steps.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [CAPINVIT] Capital Infra Trus Q4 FY26 Unitholding Pattern Filed
item.description:
Capital Infra Trus has submitted its Unitholding Pattern for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. The filing, managed by KFin Technologies Limited, details the distribution of units among various categories of holders. The total outstanding units amount to 49,15,51,733. The report indicates that Sponsor(s) and their associates hold 15,92,67,250 units (32.40% of total units), while Public Holding accounts for 33,22,84,483 units (67.60%). Key institutional holders within the public category include Mutual Funds, Insurance Companies, and Financial Institutions.

  • Unitholding pattern for Q4 FY26 filed by Capital Infra Trus.
  • Total outstanding units are 49,15,51,733.
  • Sponsor group holds 32.40% of units.
  • Public holding constitutes 67.60% of total units.
  • Mutual Funds and Insurance Companies are significant institutional holders.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Capital Infra Trus | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [UGROCAP] Ugro Capital: Re-appoints Shachindra Nath as MD & Vice Chairman
item.description:
Ugro Capital Ltd announced that its Board of Directors has approved the re-appointment of Mr. Shachindra Nath as Vice Chairman and Managing Director for a five-year term, effective June 22, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. The Board also approved audited financial statements for FY26 and the quarter ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified auditor's opinion. Additionally, the company approved the issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures up to ₹3,000 crores and recommended ESOPs for subsidiary employees. The 33rd Annual General Meeting is scheduled for May 29, 2026. The tenure of current auditors, Sharp & Tannan Associates, will conclude at the AGM, and G.P. Kapadia & Co. has been proposed as the new statutory auditors for three years.

  • Mr. Shachindra Nath re-appointed as MD & Vice Chairman for 5 years.
  • Audited FY26 financial results approved with unmodified auditor opinion.
  • Board approved ₹3,000 crore NCD issuance.
  • New statutory auditors G.P. Kapadia & Co. proposed.
  • 33rd AGM scheduled for May 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ugro Capital Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GAYAPROJ] Gayatri Projects Allots 10.9 Cr Equity Shares on Preferential Basis
item.description:
Gayatri Projects Ltd has announced the allotment of 10,90,00,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 2 each at an issue price of Rs. 10 per share, aggregating to Rs. 109 crore. This preferential allotment follows board approval on September 25, 2025, and shareholder approval at the EGM on October 23, 2025. The allotment was approved by the Issue & Allotment Committee on April 20, 2026. This issuance increases the company's paid-up equity share capital from Rs. 37.44 crore to Rs. 59.24 crore. The company will seek listing approval from stock exchanges.

  • Allotted 10.9 crore equity shares at Rs. 10 each.
  • Total funds raised amount to Rs. 109 crore.
  • Paid-up share capital increased significantly post-allotment.
  • Allotment completed on preferential basis.
  • Seeking listing approval for new shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GAYATRI PROJECTS LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [UGROCAP] Ugro Capital Appoints G. P. Kapadia & Co. as New Auditors
item.description:
Ugro Capital Ltd announced key decisions from its Board of Directors meeting held on April 20, 2026. The company approved audited financial statements for FY26 and declared an unmodified audit opinion. M/s Sharp and Tannan Associates completed their tenure as statutory auditors. M/s G. P. Kapadia & Co. have been appointed as the new statutory auditors for a three-year term, subject to shareholder approval. The board also approved the re-appointment of Mr. Shachindra Nath as Vice Chairman and MD, the issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures up to ₹3,000 crores, and recommended ESOPs for subsidiary employees. The 33rd AGM is scheduled for May 29, 2026.

  • New statutory auditors G. P. Kapadia & Co. appointed for three years.
  • Audited financial statements for FY26 approved with unmodified opinion.
  • Re-appointment of Mr. Shachindra Nath as Vice Chairman and MD approved.
  • Issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures up to ₹3,000 crores approved.
  • 33rd Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ugro Capital Ltd | Category: Auditor
